question_text: Refer to the pie chart shown below of GDP share by sector in India for 2017–18. Which sector contributes the largest share?

answer_key.explanation: Services / tertiary sector contributes the largest single share of India's GDP, consistent with the chart proportions.

visual.caption: GDP share by sector 2017–18.
visual.altText: Pie chart divided into three slices representing the three sectors of the Indian economy, with values summing to approximately one hundred percent.
